case_title: SIMON, REINHARD OWNER & DBA MAMBIZA PERCUSSION VS SANTANA, JUAN EXECUTIVE DIR. OF JUNGLE COMMUNICATI et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO KERSTIN GOETZ CREATIVE DIRECTOR JUNGLE COMMUNICATION RETUNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMON, REINHARD OWNER & DBA MAMBIZA PERCUSSION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SANTANA, JUAN EXECUTIVE DIR. OF JUNGLE COMMUNICATI GOETZ, KERSTIN CREATIVE DIR. OF JUNGLE COMMUNICATI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY SIMON, REINHARD OWNER & DBA MAMBIZA PERCUSSION AS TO DEFENDANT SANTANA, JUAN EXECUTIVE DIR. OF JUNGLE COMMUNICATI GOETZ, KERSTIN CREATIVE DIR. OF JUNGLE COMMUNICATI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
CERT MAIL TO JUAN SANTANA EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR JUNGLE COMMUNICATION RETURNED SIGNED.
PLTF DID NOT PAID THE TOTAL FEE OF $27.00 FOR FILING THE COMPLAINT & FOR TWO CERTIFIED MAILING. CLERK CALLED PLTF. PLTF SAID HE WILL MAIL PAYMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PLTF FICTITIOUS BUSINESS NAME DECLARATION FILED.
CLERK OF THE MUNICIPAL COURT RECEIVED BY MAIL A CHECK FOR $27.00 FOR COURT FEES NOT PAID ON APRIL 18, 1996.
